message:
perf(sync): use to_writer with reusable buffer for JSONL serialization

Replace serde_json::to_string + writeln! with serde_json::to_writer
into a reusable Vec<u8> buffer, followed by write_all. This avoids
allocating a new String per issue during both export_to_jsonl and
save_base_snapshot, reducing allocation pressure on large datasets.
The hash input is now computed from the same byte buffer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
